settings.useRpeEasingIdWarning: Using RPE Easing ID will disable EaseInOutQuint and EaseInOutExpo.
settings.autosaveComment:
Autosave only saves modified charts. Each autosave increases charting time by one.
(This means if you leave it idle, autosave won't fill up your hard drive or count that time)
settings.joke: Just kidding, hotkeys don't support customization. This is just a tutorial (lol)

hotkeys.placeNode: (Event Sequence Editor) Place event node pair

settings.respackExists: A resource pack with this name already exists.

create.title: Create Chart
create.name: Track Name

alert.name: Please enter the track name
alert.bpm: Please enter the correct base BPM

create.success: Chart created successfully. Redirecting to the chart in 3 seconds.

import.title: Import Chart
import.formathint: You can import charts using PEZ/ZIP packages, or upload the chart (compatible with RPEJSON), music, and illustration separately.

alert.unzipFailed: Unzip failed. Please check if the file is corrupted or in the correct format.

import.gotFile: Got the chart, illustration and music files.

form.hint: Chart identifier is used to index charts. Please use easy-to-remember English + numeric names (preferably without spaces)

idState.occupied: This identifier is already in use

alert.folderOccupied: This folder is already in use but was not previously recognized as a chart: {folder}

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete chart {name}, identifier: {id}?
delete.notFound: You have entered a chart that does not exist.
delete.alreadyWritten: You have been working on this chart for {mins} minutes since its creation.
delete.notKPA: This chart is not a KPAJSON chart. It appears to have been imported from elsewhere.
delete.hint: Deleted charts will be moved to {path}.

timeDivisor.desc: Controls the timeline density of the editor.

renderingOffset.desc:
Controls the rendering offset relative to the music/audio. Bluetooth headphone users usually need to set a lower value.
Note: This is not the "chart offset" we usually refer to. Please edit the offset in "Chart Info".

note.noNote: No target note or target note has been removed
note.warning-not-from-selected-line: Warning: This Note does not belong to the selected judge line {line}.
note.warning-lone-note: Warning: This Note does not exist in the chart.

event.noEvent: No target event or target event has been removed

cover.desc:
If set to true, notes will not render on the opposite side of where they are located.
Set to true if you want to create the effect of notes emerging from the judge line.

father.desc: Allows this judge line to inherit the coordinate system of the father line.

anchor.desc: Controls the position of the judge line anchor relative to the texture (actually changes the texture position)

group.desc:
Groups judge lines. Only affects editing.
Judge lines in the same non-default group will be rendered together in the note and event editing areas.

zOrder.desc: Controls the order of the judge line on the Z axis. Higher values are closer to the front.

attachUI.desc:
Bind chart UI components (such as chart name, combo count) to the judge line so they move with the judge line.
A UI can only be bound to one judge line, but a judge line can bind multiple UIs.
attachUI.name: Track Name

rotatesWithFather.desc: When father line is enabled, controls whether this judge line inherits the angle of the father line.

texture.desc: Judge line texture. The default texture is a white rectangle.

judgeline.uploadWarning: Filename is already in use. Upload will overwrite the existing texture. See {dir}

showsNNN.desc: Displays secondary note nodes as snap-able timelines in the note editing area. They are typically the time points where you have previously tapped notes.

NNList.desc:
Note node list is a sequence of note nodes. They contain notes of the same major category, speed, and Y offset range.
* represents displaying all lists of the judge line.

events.templateNameOccupied: This template name is already in use

encapsuleErr.notBelongToSourceSequence: Node does not belong to source sequence
encapsuleErr.zeroDelta: Value change is 0. Encapsulated template easing requires non-zero value change. Please check the blue nodes at the beginning and end.

multiNote.title: Multi-Note Editor ({count} notes from {lines} judge lines)
multiNote.warning-different-lines: Warning: Selected notes are from different judge lines, but the 'Fill' function will only fill notes in the selected judge lines.
multiNote.fillEachNeighbors: Fill between adjacent notes, step size:

chart.title: Title
chart.beautifyTooltip: If enabled, it adds newlines and indentaions to the JSON so as to make it readable, but the file size will increase.
chart.confirm: Chart is not saved. Are you sure you want to leave?
chart.noMessage: Write a commit summary to briefly summarize what you modified in the chart for easy version lookup

errors.title: Errors
errors.notify: There are errors in the chart. Open the "Errors" sidebar to check.
errors.checkComplete: Check completed. Discovered {count} error(s) in {secs} seconds.
errors.nodeParentNotFound: This node has been out of the chart.
errors.sequenceNotReferenced: This sequence is not referenced by any line.

general.baseOffsetDesc:
Set the base offset of the editor.
This option is established since the actual offset varies depending on the environment.
It is recommended to adjust this option using an already adjusted chart.
Set greater value if the sound effect is earlier than the beats, otherwise set smaller value.
This option is persistent and will be saved in the local storage.
general.replayCompensationDesc: Subtracts this value from the time when replaying after pausing to compensate for backward offset in some environments.

export.noShaderSupport: KPA only packages textures, not shaders. (In fact, it does not support using shaders)

about.title: About
about.desc: Kipphi Apparatus (KPA) is a chart editor developed by Zes Minkey Young (杨哲思).

general.pressIconToReturn: Press icon to return to home

error.chart: Oops! We encountered an error. You can press F12 to open the developer tools to view the error details. If you can't figure out the error and it persists, please join the official group (478824121) and send the chart to Zes Minkey Young.
